turns.content: Begin the session now with a short, warm, one or two sentence greeting that welcomes me and gently invites me to share what's on my mind. Keep it light — do not ask anything heavy yet.
"Welcome to our session, I'm so glad you're here. Can you start by telling me a bit about what's been on your mind lately and why you wanted to talk?"
I've been super stressed lately about financial stress and relationship stress. There's a lot of going on lately.
"Yeah, that sounds like a lot to handle. How long have you been feeling this way, and what's been the most overwhelming part of it for you?"
